name: Volcano Classic Air Filter Set
summary: The Volcano air filters can be easily replaced, making them suitable for both the Volcano Classic and the Volcano Digit.
description: The Volcano air filters can be easily replaced, making them suitable for both the Volcano Classic and the Volcano Digit.
